text: Vou pesquisar o perfil oficial da UNDIME no X — primeiro verifico o que já existe no projeto e como usar o `grok.exe` para isso.
thought:
The user wants me to research the official X (Twitter) profile for UNDIME nacional (national UNDIME organization). They want me to:
I found that SOURCES.md already mentions X (Twitter) as http://twitter.com/undime from a home snapshot. The user wants me to confirm by testing @undime and @undimenacional, and list the last 5 posts with direct URLs.
